topic: The birds on my lawn all face my window, motionless, arranged in neat rows.
title: The Birds on My Lawn Face My Window | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every bird on my lawn faces my window, still, in neat rows.
scenes.image_prompt: A green lawn covered with small birds arranged in straight rows facing a house window, dim morning light, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I first saw them while making breakfast one gray morning.
scenes.image_prompt: A kitchen window overlooking a lawn dotted with motionless birds, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Dozens of them, none of them moving.
scenes.image_prompt: A wide lawn covered in silent perched birds, deep shadow, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They were lined up too straight to be an accident.
scenes.image_prompt: Rows of birds in perfect parallel lines across grass, dim light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
A hand against a window pane facing a lawn of still birds, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Not one bird flinched, and every eye stayed on me.
scenes.image_prompt: A dense group of birds all oriented toward a single window, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stepped onto the porch to scatter them.
scenes.image_prompt: An open back door facing a lawn covered in motionless birds, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They turned their heads together, tracking me without a sound.
scenes.image_prompt: Rows of birds with heads turned in unison toward a figure, low light, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning there are more, the rows reaching closer.
scenes.image_prompt: An expanding field of silent birds advancing toward a house, dim light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the front row pressed against my back door.
scenes.image_prompt: A tight cluster of birds gathered against a closed back door, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep every curtain shut, but I feel them waiting.
scenes.image_prompt: A drawn curtain glowing faintly with dawn light, dim room, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They are not watching me. They are facing what stands behind me.
scenes.image_prompt: A lawn of birds staring past a window into a dim interior, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
